# Academic Style — PPT Template Specs

## Font Pairing
- Heading: Georgia (serif, scholarly)
- Body: Calibri (clean sans-serif for readability)
- Data/numbers: Calibri

## Color Palette (NO # prefix)
- Primary: "2C3E50" (dark navy)
- Accent 1: "2980B9" (blue, for highlights)
- Accent 2: "27AE60" (green, for positive data)
- Background: "FFFFFF" (white)
- Dark text: "2C3E50"
- Light text: "FFFFFF"
- Subtle: "F8F9FA" (near-white)

## Slide Elements
- Top rule: 2pt line, primary color, full width
- Bottom rule: 1pt line, "BDC3C7", full width
- Section numbers: "1.0", "2.0" prefix on section dividers
- Footnote area: bottom 0.5", 10pt Calibri, "7F8C8D"

## Slide Types
- Title: Centered title (32pt Georgia), subtitle (16pt Calibri), thin rules
- Section: Section number (48pt, accent1) + name (28pt), white bg
- Content: Title (22pt Georgia) + bullets (14pt Calibri) + subtle circle shape
- Table: Title + table with header (primary bg), clean borders
- Highlight: Quote or key finding, large italic Georgia (28pt)
- Closing: Institution/author info, centered, thin rules

## Layout Rules
- Max 5 bullets per slide (academic = less dense)
- Line spacing: 1.5x for body text
- References slide at end (small text, hanging indent)
- Margins: 1" left, 0.8" right, 0.6" top, 0.8" bottom
